meaning: n.<澳新口>必定的事物(尤指赛马时必赢的马)
examples: Dr Liggins (known as "Mont" after his childhood craze for Monty the Mouse) was determined to understand why such births occurred, and to prevent them.
Browne started calling Monty his "milk brother."
I do feel like I have a special bond with Georgia and Monty.
It looked like someone was attempting to recreate a scene from the Monty Pythonesque movie Brazil.
Meanwhile spinner Monty Panesar took 3-21 in arguably his most impressive spell for the national team.
